subcodes.first_line: God maketh mention of His servant in the Realms of Eternity, that he may remember God in these days wherein all have turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عبده فی لاهوت البقا لیتذکر بذکر الله فی هذه الایام التی کل اعرضوا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @thankfulness; gratitude
